items.claim: Cody Gibson is on a losing streak of two fights in a row.
items.quote: We're coming off of two losses in a row.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is hitting a wall and declining in his career.
items.quote: it's very, very obvious that he's hitting a wall and kind of falling off a cliff here at this point.

items.claim: Abdul Hussein has a violent style and scored a sick knockout of Tyson Nam.
items.quote: the knockout of Tyson Nam was sick... this guy's just really really violent, man.

items.claim: Cody Gibson's striking and wrestling will not present much of a threat to Abdul Hussein.
items.quote: I just don't think Gibson's striking or his wrestling is going to prevent that much of a threat.

items.claim: Mike Davis is a good wrestler and good striker with a good gas tank when he is healthy.
items.quote: Mike Davis, good wrestler, good striker. When he's not poisoned, he's got a good gas tank.
